# OutreachOS — longer summary

OutreachOS (https://outreachos.techxtreme.me) is a personal lead vault with a sketchbook-style UI.

## Who it’s for

Solo founders and operators who import lists from Excel, keep them private, and work a call queue without a heavy CRM.

## Main flow

1. Sign up (email + password, or Google).
2. Import Excel (`.xlsx`) — business name required; niche, country, phone, address, Maps link optional/helpful.
3. Filter, dial with sticky scripts, export CSV when needed.
4. Request Premium from `/pricing` when free limits get in the way.

## Plans

| Plan | Leads | Import files | Rows |
|------|-------|--------------|------|
| Free | 500 | 10 / day | 200 / file |
| Premium | Unlimited | 30 / hour | 3000 / hour |

Premium: ₹1499/month or $15/month. Request via email from `/pricing` (username pre-filled).

## Public URLs

- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/pricing
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/import-guide
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/privacy
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/terms
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/auth/signup

`/dashboard`, `/settings`, `/admin` stay private and shouldn’t be indexed.
